releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-01
releases.summary: Initial April 7 release attempt after the OpenClaw alignment branch.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-02
releases.summary: Second April 7 release attempt blocked by shared SDK release-source drift.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-03
releases.summary: Release candidate that carried forward unpublished April 7 changes but failed before GitHub publication.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-04
releases.summary: Release candidate that carried forward all unpublished April 7 changes but still failed before GitHub publication because the GitHub-backed release workspace did not materialize the IM SDK packages required by @sdkwork/core-pc-react.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-05
releases.summary: Release candidate that carried forward all unpublished April 7 changes and materialized the IM SDK package roots, but still failed before publication because the IM TypeScript package scripts depended on a monorepo-specific node_modules layout.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-06
releases.summary: Release candidate that carried forward every unpublished April 7 change and closed the IM SDK clean-room build gaps, but still failed before publication because the remaining release smoke flow was not yet portable across Windows and Linux clean-room hosts.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-07
releases.summary: Release candidate that carried forward every unpublished April 7 change and closed the cross-platform release smoke gaps, but still failed before publication because the OpenClaw clean-clone verification layer was not yet safe on Linux-hosted release jobs.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-08
releases.summary: Release candidate that carried forward every unpublished April 7 change and hardened OpenClaw clean-clone verification, but still failed before publication because the desktop embedded-host release verification drifted from the live managed OpenClaw control plane.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-09
releases.summary: Release candidate that carries forward every unpublished April 7 change, repairs the desktop embedded-host shared workbench authority wiring, aligns the remaining desktop runtime fixtures with current OpenClaw readiness contracts, and is ready for GitHub publication.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-10
releases.summary: Step 01 baseline audit iteration that freezes the current Claw Studio and OpenClaw architecture evidence, hotspot inventory, and next-step priorities before runtime and API refactors.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-11
releases.summary: Step 02 host-shell-foundation hardening iteration that turns thin-host boundaries and feature wiring into script-enforced gates, and makes sync:features safe for the current workspace topology.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-12
releases.summary: Step 03 runtime truth-source unification iteration that promotes the dedicated OpenClaw kernel snapshot into install/bootstrap flows and freezes the shared desktop-server-docker-k8s architecture, API, proxy, and release standards.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-07-13
releases.summary: Step 03 hosted-browser runtime-truth iteration that aligns runtime platform semantics across desktopCombined/server/container/kubernetes modes and preserves deployment-family metadata for unified host contracts.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-01
releases.summary: Step 03 install/bootstrap hardening iteration that keeps guided OpenClaw bootstrap anchored to the kernel runtime truth source and downgrades optional ClawHub catalog loading so it can no longer block the managed-provider projection chain.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-02
releases.summary: Step 03 market-package contract iteration that aligns sdkwork-claw-market with the Node-safe @sdkwork/claw-core root import pattern and updates the package contract gate so dynamic root imports no longer fail local verification.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-03
releases.summary: Step 03 install-package root export iteration that restores namespace exports for guided wizard services, aligns sdkwork-claw-install service-root consumption with component expectations, and writes the guard back into the install contract script.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-04
releases.summary: Step 03 market-service Node-safe iteration that converts mySkillService to lazy root-default resolution for @sdkwork/claw-instances, aligns the market contract gate with that runtime-safe pattern, and removes the package-local TS2352 test casts that had been hiding the next workspace blockers.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-05
releases.summary: Step 03 install/settings contract iteration that replaces the remaining TS2352 test casts with real service input types and restores the missing @sdkwork/claw-core Node root export required by providerConfigCenterService under strip-types execution.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-06
releases.summary: Step 03 test-contract alignment iteration that normalizes provider-center record fixtures, updates agent-install platform/studio stubs to the latest infrastructure contracts, and advances the workspace lint frontier to appStoreService.test.ts.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-07
releases.summary: Step 03 app-store contract iteration that removes the appStoreService test-type drift, updates stale assessment fixtures to the current installer issue contract, and converts the default app-store catalog dependency to lazy root resolution so Node-safe execution no longer fails before explicit test overrides can apply.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-08
releases.summary: Step 03 OpenClaw gateway-history fixture iteration that refreshes the chat gateway config test onto the current StudioInstanceDetailRecord and OpenClawConfigSnapshot contracts, removing that file from the workspace lint blocker stack and advancing the frontier to instanceWorkbenchService.test.ts.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-09
releases.summary: Step 03 instance-workbench contract iteration that aligns the largest sdkwork-claw-instances test file with the current managed-config, channel-definition, and workbench-task contracts, removes the broad gateway as-any typing holes, and advances the workspace lint frontier to the next instances capability tests.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-10
releases.summary: Step 03 instances fixture-typing iteration that converts the OpenClaw capability and provider-workspace presentation tests to nested partial detail overrides, removing that helper drift from the blocker stack and advancing the workspace lint frontier to broader package tests.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-11
releases.summary: Step 03 channel-bridge and chat-contract iteration that promotes browser channel writes into the root studio bridge contract, forwards them through the lazy web adapter, and clears the next chat/type blocker cluster.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-12
releases.summary: Step 03 Node-root alignment iteration that lazy-loads app SDK defaults for community and dashboard commerce services, publishes both through the core Node root, and refreshes install progress fixtures to the current progress-event contract.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-13
releases.summary: Step 03 install-package contract iteration that upgrades install bootstrap and recommendation tests onto the current OpenClaw bootstrap, provider-routing, config-snapshot, and assessment contracts without changing runtime behavior.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-14
releases.summary: Step 03 workspace contract-convergence iteration that clears the remaining TypeScript lint frontier by finishing OpenClaw bootstrap fixture drift, runtime-only barrel alignment, settings/local-AI-proxy test contracts, package-root shell exports, and mall/tasks wrapper contract drift.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-15
releases.summary: Step 03 post-TypeScript parity iteration that realigns browser-root wrappers, package-root exports, and live runtime barrels across core/auth/settings/agent/chat/dashboard/devices, keeps build green, and advances the remaining lint frontier to the sdkwork-claw-instances IDE dependency contract.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-16
releases.summary: Step 03 package-contract closure iteration that restores Monaco runtime ownership for sdkwork-claw-instances, realigns explicit shell-facing root exports across settings and instances, publishes the missing tasks root surfaces, and returns fresh workspace lint and build evidence to green.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-17
releases.summary: Step 03 CP03-3 desktop rollback-evidence iteration that adds an explicit OpenClaw upgrade-and-rollback evidence report, wires it into the desktop runtime gate, hardens sandbox-only release-flow git checks, and proves the current 2026.4.2 desktop rollback baseline against the prepared runtime and packaged release assets.

releases.title: Claw Studio release-2026-04-08-18
releases.summary: Step 03 CP03-2 local-ai-proxy projection-module iteration that extracts managed OpenClaw provider projection into a dedicated Rust submodule, hardens the desktop foundation gate around that boundary, fixes a stale OpenClaw release-contract fixture list, and returns fresh desktop/runtime/lint/build evidence to green.

releases.summary: Step 03 CP03-2 local-ai-proxy config-module iteration that extracts proxy config loading and public-host normalization into a dedicated Rust submodule, hardens the desktop foundation gate around that boundary, and keeps fresh desktop structural and runtime tests green.
